about.intro: Hi, I'm Will. I fix software for a living and break it for fun.
paragraphs: Outside of work I make small things for fun (this site is one of them), play games of all sorts, do trivia, watch movies, and travel when I can.
I'm slowly working my way toward building this stuff for a living instead of supporting it.

items.name: java is fine
items.note: and more people use it than you think

projects.title: wallbing
projects.blurb: Wallpaper site using Bing.com images with added filter and image tagging. Hosted on github pages and deployed automatically with github actions

projects.title: personal website
projects.blurb: This website you're on right now! Features an LLM visualization, hosted on github pages and deployed automatically with github actions. Made on Replit
